name: shipwright
description: Shipwright SDLC — AI-powered software delivery lifecycle framework

plugins.name: shipwright-run
plugins.description: Orchestrate the full Shipwright SDLC pipeline — from user description to deployed application

plugins.name: shipwright-project
plugins.description: Decompose project requirements into well-scoped planning units with IREB-aligned specs

plugins.name: shipwright-design
plugins.description: Generate UI mockups from IREB specs — standalone HTML screens and user flows

plugins.name: shipwright-plan
plugins.description: Deep planning with research, interview, external LLM review, and TDD approach

plugins.name: shipwright-build
plugins.description: TDD implementation with code review, Conventional Commits, and feature branch workflow

plugins.name: shipwright-test
plugins.description: Profile-aware test runner: unit tests, smoke tests, Playwright E2E, and security scans

plugins.name: shipwright-deploy
plugins.description: Deploy to Jelastic (Infomaniak) with smoke test verification and rollback support

plugins.name: shipwright-changelog
plugins.description: Parse Conventional Commits, generate Keep-a-Changelog entries, create version tags and PRs

plugins.name: shipwright-security
plugins.description: Security scanning via Aikido API with automated remediation loop

plugins.name: shipwright-compliance
plugins.description: IREB traceability, Requirements Traceability Matrix, SBOM, test evidence, and change history reports

plugins.name: shipwright-iterate
plugins.description: Lightweight SDLC for ongoing changes. Auto-detects intent (feature/change/bug) and runs specs → build → test → commit.

plugins.name: shipwright-preview
plugins.description: Local browser preview — start dev server and show URL for in-browser testing
